doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such protocol (EAJP-2025) exists in the State Bar of California's official records, and its provisions—including a blanket UPL waiver under B&P §6125 and elimination of pre-filing attorney review—are legally implausible under California
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such protocol (EAJP-2025) exists in the State Bar of California's official records; the document contains legally implausible provisions (e.g., a blanket UPL waiver under B&P §6125, pre-filing attorney review being entirely optional, and paralegals receiving court filings on a client's behalf) that are inconsistent with California law and actual State Bar regulatory practice, strongly indicating this is an invented document.
